CONTENT.Club career: Youssouf made his professional debut for Bordeaux in a 1–1 Ligue 1 away draw against Bastia on 30 November 2016.On 5 July 2019, Youssouf signed with Ligue 1 side Saint-Étienne.On 4 August 2022, Youssouf signed a four-year contract with Famalicão in Portugal.
CONTENT.Personal life: Youssouf was born in France, and is of Comorian Malagasy descent. He is married to Nawëal Ouinekh.
CONTENT.External links: France profile at FFFZaydou Youssouf at L'Équipe Football (in French)Fox Sports ProfileZaydou Youssouf – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)

SUMMARY: Zaydou Youssouf (born 11 July 1999) is a French professional footballer who plays as a central midfielder for Primeira Liga club Famalicão.
